creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
2014/1/6 Raphael Kubo da Costa <rakuco@freebsd.org>:
> Actually, this is caused by licq's copy of gtest being too old and not
> building correctly with libc++. The patch in ports/185536 should fix
> this problem.

I tried to use this patch and it helped - port was built and installed
correctly.
But then I have a problem with another licq-related port: net-im/licq-qt-gui:
